arts.ttl: Football fans slam 'tone-deaf' Erling Haaland for calling out people for 'not using the sauna because they are lazy' while he earns £865,000 per week
arts.sum: Haaland is back fit for Man City after missing their defeat by Liverpool, scoring the winner in the 1-0 victory over Tottenham in midweek to help keep up his side's Champions League push.

arts.ttl: 'I was Plymouth hero who lost a tooth in Liverpool shock - now I want to KO Man City'
arts.sum: Plymouth Argyle defender Nikola Katic is out to cause another FA Cup shock against Manchester City after helping Miron Muslic's side past Liverpool in the fourth round

arts.ttl: Real Madrid hit with partial stadium closure and UEFA fine over 'discriminatory' fan behaviour during Man City clash
arts.sum: Los Blancos supporters who attended the Champions League game at the Santiago Bernabeu have landed in hot water

arts.ttl: Theo Hernandez: Man City, Real Madrid handed huge transfer boost in pursuit of AC Milan left-back
arts.sum: AC Milan technical director Geoffrey Moncada hints that the Serie A club could sell Man City and Real Madrid-linked Theo Hernandez this summer if the left-back does not extend his contract.

arts.ttl: Mumba returns: Plymouth Argyle team news and predicted XI to face Manchester City
arts.sum: The latest Plymouth Argyle team news as Miron Muslic's side gear up to face Manchester City in the FA Cup. The post Mumba returns: Plymouth Argyle team news and predicted XI to face Manchester City appeared first on The72 - Football League News.

arts.ttl: Man City: Pep Guardiola issues blunt response to Javier Tebas accusations
arts.sum: Tebas revealed that the Spanish league has filed a complaint to the EU Commission

arts.ttl: Svilar nears Roma contract renewal to fend off Man City interest
arts.sum: Roma is nearing a contract extension for their goalkeeper Mile Svilar, who has been one...

arts.ttl: Pep Guardiola determined to avoid FA Cup upset against ‘tricky’ Plymouth
arts.sum: Plymouth have already knocked Liverpool and Brentford out of the competition

arts.ttl: Isak, Haaland, Bobb: The latest FPL team news

arts.ttl: Pep Guardiola issues blunt one-word reply as Man City face new accusations
arts.sum: Manchester City are facing yet another accusation over their finances after La Liga boss Javier Tebas accused them of a scandal and confirmed his organisation had reported them to the European Commission
